title: koeleria caudata
intro: Koeleria caudata, also known as late Koeler's grass, is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Koeleria caudata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and aid in the treatment of skin infections. Koeleria caudata is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and teas, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
